creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
This report to net@ from May 24:

> Status      |    Bug Id | Description
> ------------+-----------+---------------------------------------------------
> New         |    197535 | [re] [panic] if_re (Realtek 8168) causes memory w 
> Open        |    194515 | Fatal Trap 12 Kernel with vimage                  
> Open        |    199136 | [if_tap] Added down_on_close sysctl variable to t 
>
> 3 problems total for which you should take action.

includes https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=199136, but doesn't include https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=200185 which is also assigned to net@, and also has Open status.

There is something wrong with the query that retrieves the list, because both bug reports should be in the list.

Query should be by 'assigned-to', and 'status' fields only.
